libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure generated JVM tests and native-image build/run arguments with `--add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED`. The artifact's normal runtime dependencies (`javax.inject` and `aopalliance`) are declared by its POM; CGLIB/ASM are jarjar-embedded in the main jar. Do not add external setup just to recover 2.1.7 internal class names; in 2.9.1 many internal util/CGLIB classes are relocated with `$`-prefixed names.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8858 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-guice:2.9.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 2.1.7 tests import old internal names such as `MapMaker`, `MethodProxy`, and `Signature`; 2.9.1 exposes jarjar-relocated `$MapMaker`, `$MethodProxy`, and `$Signature` instead, so tests may need source updates rather than dependencies.
Without the `--add-opens` JVM/native-image argument, CGLIB proxy/interceptor paths can fail at runtime with inaccessible `ClassLoader#defineClass` access.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: sisu-guice 2.9.1 embeds Guice/CGLIB bytecode generation; meaningful interceptor/proxy coverage needs java.lang opened on modern JDKs, but no extra Maven dependency or Docker image is required.
